Class AvroMessageConverterProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.schema.registry.avro.AvroMessageConverterProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="spring.cloud.stream.schema.avro") public class AvroMessageConverterProperties extends Object
Author:
Vinicius Carvalho, Sercan Karaoglu, Christian Tzolov
